faq.title: Good to know.
faq.subtitle: Everything worth knowing before you try Chatblix.

items.question: Which channels does Chatblix support?
items.answer: WhatsApp Business, Instagram DMs, Messenger, Telegram, TikTok DMs, and email — through official Meta and TikTok APIs. Nothing scraped, nothing fragile.

items.question: How does the AI actually reply?
items.answer: It's trained on your brand voice, FAQs, and past conversations. It drafts or sends replies, escalates when confidence drops, and only answers from your approved knowledge base.

items.question: Is my customer data safe?
items.answer: Conversations are encrypted in transit and at rest. We never train foundation models on your data. Export or delete anything, anytime.

items.question: Can my team share the inbox?
items.answer: Yes. Assign chats, leave internal notes, tag teammates, and see who replied to what. Admins get live workload and response-time views.

items.question: Is there a mobile app?
items.answer: Yes — native iOS and Android with push, voice replies, and offline drafts. Available on the App Store and Google Play.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: Under 10 minutes. Connect your Meta and TikTok accounts, import FAQs, and your AI starts answering the same afternoon.
